title: Shut Up MCD
description: Add-on for the MCDW, MCDA and MCDAR mods to toggle their item lore.
body:
Shut Up MCD is a lightweight, client-side utility mod designed to declutter your inventory screen!

If you play with the Minecraft Dungeons Armors (MCDA), Minecraft Dungeons Weapons (MCDW) or Minecraft Dungeons Artifacts (MCDAR) mods, you already know that the items come with big walls of flavor text. This can take up a lot of screen real estate, and make it hard to read your enchantments and stats, especially by people who have larger GUI sizes.

This mod gives you full control over what tooltip information you want to see.
